meta.title: DEF CON Safe ModeBlue Team Village - Olaf Hartong, Mauricio Velazco - Purple On My Mind
meta.description: Automated adversary simulation is often perceived as a hard, dangerous and complicated program to implement and run. Fear no longer, our methodology and tooling will let you test and measure your defenses throughout your production environment to test not only your detection rule’s resilience but the whole event pipeline as well as your team’s response procedures. In this talk, we’ll share with the audience the open source tools we built and the methodology we use that will allow them to hit the ground running at nearly no cost.
